summary: PR 2719 was a code-style/tooling cleanup that added clang-format linting to GitHub Actions and applied clang-format-driven formatting changes across a large source/header surface. The visible diff shows .github/workflows/lint.yml adding a pre-commit clang-format step, while C changes are formatting-only line wrapping and indentation around asserts, calls, conditions, and arithmetic expressions. A decomp-dev bot issue comment reported 'No changes' for GALE01 over ad1e61c..faf4010.

key_files.role: CI workflow changed to run clang-format via pre-commit/action@v3.0.1 with extra_args 'clang-format --all-files' after the existing tools/check run.
Representative formatting-only C source changes: HSD_ASSERTMSG calls, long arithmetic expressions, and wrapped assignments were reformatted.
Large representative fighter-source formatting sweep: long conditions, inline returns, function calls, and wrapped expressions were reformatted without visible semantic edits in the loaded excerpt.
Largest changed file by metadata; formatting changes are indicated by changed-file counts but detailed hunks were not loaded in the visible excerpt.
Large sysdolphin/baselib formatting target by metadata; detailed hunks were not loaded in the visible excerpt.
Changed-file manifest for the slice; records 202 changed files in the PR activity metadata, including workflow, C sources, and headers across many subsystems.

what_changed: Added a GitHub Actions lint step named 'Run clang-format' using pre-commit/action@v3.0.1 with extra_args 'clang-format --all-files'.
Applied clang-format output across 202 changed files according to the PR activity metadata.

Visible C excerpts show formatting-only edits such as merging short assert macro calls onto one line, splitting long arithmetic assignments, wrapping long function-call arguments, and moving braces/conditions into clang-format style.
Changed-file metadata shows broad coverage across camera, fighter common/Crazy Hand/Kirby, game mode, stage/ground, interface, item, menu, platform, lb/mp/ty, and sysdolphin baselib files.
The loaded changed-files manifest is truncated, so the intake record preserves representative/high-impact files rather than claiming an exhaustive per-file analysis.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired a CI enforcement change with a repository-wide formatting sweep, reducing the chance that enabling clang-format would immediately fail on existing files.
The clang-format check was added after the existing Python check step in the same lint workflow, keeping style enforcement in the established CI lint path.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For this PR slice, the reusable lesson is process-oriented rather than decomp-shape-specific: broad mechanical formatting should be isolated from semantic decomp edits so reviewers and bot reports can treat it as style/tooling churn.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt formatting-only examples in camera.c and ftCo_0A01.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: No assembly, objdiff steering, PAD_STACK, pragma/register steering, symbol renaming, or matching-specific tactic is evidenced in the loaded diff; edits appear to be clang-format mechanical formatting.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep mechanical clang-format sweeps separate from semantic decomp edits
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2719 supports a process lesson: when enabling clang-format in CI, pair the CI check with a mechanical formatting sweep and avoid mixing in semantic decomp changes. The loaded evidence shows a workflow addition plus formatting-only examples, and the bot reported GALE01 'No changes'.

source_update_candidates.title: Format-only PR hygiene for clang-format enforcement
source_update_candidates.text: Consider documenting that clang-format enablement or large formatting sweeps should be kept separate from semantic decomp work, with CI/bot evidence noted when available.
evidence_refs: PR 2719 title and labels: code-style, tooling
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a possible global process standard, but it should be curated rather than automatically promoted from one PR.

source_update_candidates.title: CI lint workflow includes clang-format through pre-commit
source_update_candidates.text: The historical PR evidence shows .github/workflows/lint.yml adding a 'Run clang-format' step using pre-commit/action@v3.0.1 with extra_args 'clang-format --all-files'.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for tooling-history documentation or CI path facts if the curator maintains such records.
